name: Mimi's Custard Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Lightly grease the insides of an 8-inch-square glass or ceramic baking dish with about 1 teaspoon unsalted butter.
3. Beat eggs into milk and strain through sieve into mixing bowl. Stir in all the remaining ingredients except cinnamon, nutmeg, and cream. Pour into buttered baking dish and smooth top until level.
4. Place baking dish in a larger baking pan. Pour in enough boiling water to come halfway up the sides of the baking dish. Bake in preheated oven for 30 minutes. Stir pudding gently so that rice and raisins are distributed evenly throughout. Continue baking for another 30 minutes, then stir again.
5. Carefully smooth top of pudding until level, then sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg. Continue baking for 20 minutes or until pudding is set, adding more boiling water to the baking pan if needed to maintain a level. Lift pudding from the water bath and cool at room temperature. Serve slightly warm or well chilled. Sweet cream can be poured over individual portions arranged in saucers.
